nodes.text:
Patient reports weight loss and mucous discharge over 3 weeks, with increasing severity. Patient also reports back pain. Relevant history includes chronic kidney disease stage 3.


MRI pelvis on 14/08/2024: T3b, N1, CRM clear, EMVI negative. Patient wishes to avoid surgery, consider CRT.
